settings.text: JPS X Exclusive Unlock early access to Jaspal The Edit x Proud & Tan on 5 February 2026. Shop the Collection: www.jaspal.com/pages/jaspal-the-edit-proud-tan

Unlock exclusive privileges for JPS X members  Shop the highly anticipated Jaspal The Edit x Proud & Tan collection before anyone else on February 5, 2026. Plus, receive x2 Reward Points on your first order from February 5 - 11, 2026. Own exclusive items from this unique collaboration.

Sign up and shop today to upgrade your style with these limited-edition items.

How to Access Early Access 

JPS X Members 

  • Log in to your account: www.jaspal.com/account/login 
  • Check membership status: 
  • Click the icon 👤 and view your JPS Club membership number under account details. 
  • If you have not yet linked your JPS Club membership card to your online account, please proceed according to this guide: www.jaspal.com/pages/how-to-link-jps 

New Customers who are already JPS Club Members 

  • Create a user account on the website: www.jaspal.com/account/register 
  • Customers who already have a JPS Club membership can link their JPS Club membership card to their online account using their phone number on the login page. (Note: Email and phone number must match on both the online account and JPS Club) 

New Customers who are NOT yet JPS Club Members 

  • Create a user account on the website: www.jaspal.com/account/register 
  • Register for JPS Club membership: www.jpsclub.com/#/register 
  • Link your membership card to your website account: www.jaspal.com/pages/how-to-link-jps 
  • Check your membership level and privileges: www.jaspal.com/pages/jps-club-beginner-guide

TERMS & CONDITIONS APPLY

  • By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: www.jaspal.com/policies/terms-of-service
  • Once your order is confirmed, it cannot be modified or canceled.
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at: www.jaspal.com/policies/refund-policy
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
